summary: TrustTrade login bug fix testing complete. All auth flow tests passed. The new implementation with useRef guards (initialized, hasProcessed, hasRedirected) successfully prevents redirect loops. Backend APIs working correctly. Frontend auth flow verified: landing page loads, unauthenticated users redirected from /dashboard to /, authenticated users can access /dashboard without loops, auth persists on refresh, logout works correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: /api/auth/me returns user data with valid Bearer token
✅ Frontend: Landing page loads with Login/SignUp buttons
✅ Frontend: Console shows AUTH_STATE_INITIALIZED log on app load
✅ Frontend: Unauthenticated user trying to access /dashboard gets redirected to /
✅ Frontend: Console shows PROTECTED_ROUTE_RENDERED log when accessing protected routes
✅ Frontend: Authenticated user (with valid localStorage token) can access /dashboard without redirect loop
✅ Frontend: Refresh /dashboard with auth persists (doesn't redirect)
✅ Frontend: Logout clears session_token from localStorage and redirects to /

critical_code_review_comments.comment: Good implementation: useRef guard (initialized) prevents double execution of auth initialization. Synchronous state init from localStorage prevents flash of unauthenticated state.
Good implementation: hasRedirected useRef prevents redirect loops. hasLocalAuth fallback handles race conditions between context and localStorage.
Good implementation: hasProcessed useRef with empty dependency array ensures session processing runs exactly once.

Minor: handleLogout only removes session_token but not user_data from localStorage. Should use AuthContext logout() instead for consistency. Not a critical issue since auth check relies on session_token.

test_credentials: Test user created via mongosh with session_token: test_session_1774376367049 (cleaned up after testing)
seed_data_creation: Created test user and session via mongosh for testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth flow bug fix verified. Key components: AuthContext.js (useRef initialized guard, synchronous localStorage init), ProtectedRoute.js (hasRedirected useRef, hasLocalAuth fallback), AuthCallback.js (hasProcessed useRef, empty dependency array). Console logs added: AUTH_STATE_INITIALIZED, TOKEN_PRESENT, NAVIGATE_CALLED, PROTECTED_ROUTE_RENDERED, LOGIN_CALLED, LOGIN_COMPLETE, LOGOUT_CALLED, LOGOUT_COMPLETE. Test user creation pattern: use mongosh to create user with user_id, email, name, created_at (ISO string), and session with session_token, user_id, expires_at (ISO string).
